title: Context menu component for diagram editing with dynamic options
purpose: Provides a floating context menu that appears when users click on diagram elements, offering type-specific actions for editing, modifying, or deleting nodes and edges.
module_context: Exports a React functional component ContextMenu that accepts various props for positioning, element type, and callback handlers. Includes a ref for menu element and useEffect for handling outside clicks and escape key events.

steps.content: Initialize a ref for the menu element.
Set up event listeners for clicks outside the menu and escape key presses.
Clean up event listeners when the component unmounts.
Define a handler for menu item clicks that invokes the appropriate callback and closes the menu.
Render the menu with position based on provided coordinates.
Display different menu options depending on whether the clicked element is a node or edge.
Check if the clicked target is outside the menu element.
IF the click is outside, invoke the close callback.
IF the escape key is pressed, invoke the close callback.
Invoke the provided callback with the target element ID.
Close the context menu after the callback execution.
